welcome.card_body: Bills, chores, groceries and more — all in one place for you and your housemates.

onboarding.slide1_body: Track bills, chores, parking, groceries — everything your household needs in one app.
onboarding.slide2_body: Add shared expenses, split them equally or set custom amounts. See who owes what, instantly.
onboarding.slide3_body: Claim the parking spot, reserve it in advance, share a grocery list — all in real time with your housemates.

house_setup.title: Set up your home
house_setup.subtitle: Create a new house or join one your housemate already set up.
house_setup.create_house_sub: Start a new home and invite your housemates.
house_setup.join_house_sub: Use an invite code from a housemate.
house_setup.house_name_placeholder: House name (e.g. The Flat, 12 Oak St)
house_setup.invite_code_hint: Ask a housemate to share the invite code from their Settings screen.
house_setup.code_not_found: Invite code not found. Check it and try again.

housemates.title: Housemates
housemates.invite_body: Share this code with your housemates. They enter it when signing up to join your house.
housemates.just_you_hint: Share the invite code above and your housemates will appear here once they join.
housemates.join_instructions: Housemates join by creating an account and entering your invite code. You cannot manually add them — this keeps everyone's data private and secure.

members.title: Member Permissions
members.subtitle: Control what each housemate can access in HouseMates. Owners and admins always have full access.
members.your_permissions_note: Your own permissions are managed by the house owner.
members.change_role_body: Admins can also manage categories and member permissions.

members.remove_body: They'll be taken off the house and can't see it anymore. Their past bills and messages stay, shown as "(left)". They can rejoin later with the invite code.

spending.compare_house: Compared to {{month}}, the house spent {{house}} and your share was {{share}}.
spending.add_bills_hint: Add some bills to see your spending breakdown.

nfc_parking.title: NFC Parking Tag
nfc_parking.how_it_works_body: Stick an NFC tag in your car. Set up an Apple Shortcut that calls this function when you tap the tag — it claims the spot when you arrive and releases it when you leave. Everything happens in the background with the screen off.
nfc_parking.step1_hint: This token proves it's you. Never share it with anyone.
nfc_parking.share_token_hint: Opens share sheet so you can copy the token
nfc_parking.reset_token_hint: Generates a new token, your current NFC tag will stop working
nfc_parking.reset_body: Your current NFC tag will stop working. You will need to update your Apple Shortcut with the new token.
nfc_parking.reset_error: Could not reset the token. Please try again.
nfc_parking.load_error: Could not load your token. Please try again.
nfc_parking.step2_hint: This is the address your Shortcut will call.
nfc_parking.step3_1: Open the Shortcuts app on your iPhone.
nfc_parking.step3_3: Tap "Scan" and hold your phone near the tag to register it. Give it a name like "Car Tag".
nfc_parking.step3_4: Add action: Get Contents of URL.
nfc_parking.step3_5: Set the URL to your Function URL (Step 2).
nfc_parking.step3_7: Tap Add Header → Name: Authorization, Value: Bearer <paste your token>.
nfc_parking.step3_8: Turn off "Ask Before Running" so it runs silently.
nfc_parking.step3_9: Tap Done. Tap the tag to test — the parking spot should toggle!
nfc_parking.nfc_tag_body: Any NTAG213, NTAG215, or NTAG216 tag works. You can buy a pack of 10 for a few dollars on Amazon. Stick one on your dashboard or sun visor.

premium.title: HouseMates Premium
premium.subtitle: Support the app and unlock the full experience for your house.
premium.active_subtitle: Premium is active — thanks for supporting HouseMates!
premium.load_error: Could not check your Premium status. Please try again.
premium.feature_ad_free_sub: No banners, anywhere in the app
premium.feature_unlimited_photos_sub: No cap on your house photo gallery
premium.feature_pdf_reports_sub: Export your expense history as a professional PDF
premium.feature_custom_themes_sub: House colors and extra dark mode styles
premium.price_placeholder: Pricing will be announced when Premium launches.
premium.coming_soon_body: Premium isn't available for purchase yet — we're still setting it up. Everything stays free until then.
premium.dev_toggle_sub: Flips the entitlement flag to test gated features
premium.upsell_body: Go ad-free and unlock unlimited photos, PDF reports and custom themes.
premium.settings_sub: Ad-free, unlimited photos, PDF reports and more
premium.photo_limit_title: You've reached the free photo limit
premium.photo_limit_body: The free plan holds up to {{count}} photos. Premium removes the limit.
